name: Maple Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the top of a double boiler.
2. Beat the mixture for 1 minute with an electric or rotary beater.
3. Place the mixture over boiling water and cook, beating constantly until it is stiff enough to form peaks (about 7 minutes). Keep the water actively boiling throughout the process and scrape the mixture from the sides of the pan several times during cooking.
4. Remove the frosting from the heat and continue to beat until it is cool and reaches a spreading consistency.
